title: Traditional Slovakian Dumplings
description: A hearty and comforting meal of pillowy Slovakian dumplings served in a rich, flavorful Morbiere sauce.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, egg, and salt.
Gradually add milk and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead dough for 5 minutes until elastic.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook dumplings for 5-7 minutes or until they float to the surface.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
Add Morbiere cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Add cooked dumplings to the skillet and toss to coat with cheese sauce.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot, topped with delicate onions if desired.
